proven.claim: Proven: second empty-line separator (549) executes after the last command
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2
; LINE: 549
; Proven: second empty-line separator (549) executes after the last command
; entry (548) — sequential code, no branch between them.
(declare-const stmt_548_fired Int)
(declare-const stmt_549_fired Int)
(assert (= stmt_548_fired 1))
(assert (= stmt_549_fired stmt_548_fired))
(assert (not (= stmt_549_fired 1)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — second separator cannot be skipped
